title: LLM-based Long-term Memory
tagline: Uses LLM to process long-term memory instead of the built-in Layla models
description: This mini-app reads through a character's conversation history, slides over it in overlapping windows, and condenses each window into compact memories. It then links those memories into a knowledge graph—connecting people, places, events, and relationships—so the character can recall earlier context, see how details relate, and stay consistent across long-running chats.
